requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Equipment Radio Disturbance (MNS/IEC CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明设备无线电骚扰（MNS/IEC CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明設備無線電騷擾（MNS/IEC CISPR 15）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (emissions) for LED lighting in Mongolia is addressed through the Mongolian national standard adopting CISPR 15 (MNS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on mains terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions. Where EMC is part of the regulated-product scope, MASM conformity certification requires test evidence against the adopted CISPR 15-based standard. Because Mongolia's adopted standard, China's GB 17743, and the international CISPR 15 share the same technical basis, emission limits are broadly harmonized. Confirm with MASM whether EMC test evidence is required for the specific luminaire category and which laboratory accreditation is accepted.
summary.zh: 蒙古 LED 照明的电磁兼容性（发射）通过采用 CISPR 15 的蒙古国家标准处理（MNS CISPR 15——电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射。在 EMC 属于受管制产品范围的情况下，MASM 合格认证须提供按所采用 CISPR 15 标准出具的检测证据。由于蒙古所采标准、中国 GB 17743 及国际 CISPR 15 技术基础相同，发射限值基本协调。请与 MASM 确认特定灯具类别是否须提供 EMC 检测证据，以及所接受的实验室认可资质。
summary.zht: 蒙古 LED 照明的電磁兼容性（發射）通過採用 CISPR 15 的蒙古國家標準處理（MNS CISPR 15——電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射。在 EMC 屬於受管制產品範圍的情況下，MASM 合格認證須提供按所採用 CISPR 15 標準出具的檢測證據。由於蒙古所採標準、中國 GB 17743 及國際 CISPR 15 技術基礎相同，發射限值基本協調。請與 MASM 確認特定燈具類別是否須提供 EMC 檢測證據，以及所接受的實驗室認可資質。

standards_or_laws: MNS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (adopts CISPR 15)
MASM — conformity certification for regulated products (EMC where in scope)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification for relevant product categories, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Because GB 17743, the Mongolian CISPR 15-based standard, and CISPR 15 itself share a common base, the emission limits are closely aligned, but CCC and MASM are separate conformity processes.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证的组成部分，检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。由于 GB 17743、蒙古所采 CISPR 15 标准及 CISPR 15 本身基础相同，发射限值高度一致，但 CCC 与 MASM 为各自独立的合格评定流程。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證的組成部分，檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。由於 GB 17743、蒙古所採 CISPR 15 標準及 CISPR 15 本身基礎相同，發射限值高度一致，但 CCC 與 MASM 為各自獨立的合格評定流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Emission limits are largely harmonized because Mongolia's adopted standard, China's GB 17743, and CISPR 15 share the same technical base — so a product meeting GB 17743 generally meets the equivalent CISPR 15-based limits. The gap is again procedural rather than technical: a Chinese CCC EMC test report is not automatically accepted for Mongolian market access; EMC evidence must support the MASM conformity certification where EMC is within scope. Where MASM accepts ILAC-recognised laboratory reports or IEC/CISPR-based CB-style evidence, an existing CNAS-accredited (ILAC member) report may be usable — confirm acceptance with MASM. Verify whether EMC is a mandatory element of certification for the specific luminaire category, and the documentation language required.
gap.zh: 由于蒙古所采标准、中国 GB 17743 及 CISPR 15 技术基础相同，发射限值基本协调——故符合 GB 17743 的产品通常满足对应的 CISPR 15 限值。差距仍为程序性而非技术性：中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被蒙古市场准入自动接受；在 EMC 属于范围内时，EMC 证据须支持 MASM 合格认证。在 MASM 接受 ILAC 认可实验室报告或基于 IEC/CISPR 的 CB 式证据的情况下，现有 CNAS 认可（ILAC 成员）报告可能可用——须向 MASM 确认受理。请核实 EMC 是否为特定灯具类别认证的强制要素，以及所需文件语言。
gap.zht: 由於蒙古所採標準、中國 GB 17743 及 CISPR 15 技術基礎相同，發射限值基本協調——故符合 GB 17743 的產品通常滿足對應的 CISPR 15 限值。差距仍為程序性而非技術性：中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被蒙古市場准入自動接受；在 EMC 屬於範圍內時，EMC 證據須支持 MASM 合格認證。在 MASM 接受 ILAC 認可實驗室報告或基於 IEC/CISPR 的 CB 式證據的情況下，現有 CNAS 認可（ILAC 成員）報告可能可用——須向 MASM 確認受理。請核實 EMC 是否為特定燈具類別認證的強制要素，以及所需文件語言。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EMC emissions evidence against the adopted CISPR 15-based MNS standard supports MASM conformity certification; confirm whether EMC is required for the specific luminaire category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lighting EMC emissions for Mongolia are addressed via the adopted CISPR 15-based MNS standard under MASM conformity certification. Limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), so re-testing burden may be reduced. However, CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted — confirm with MASM whether EMC is in scope for the luminaire category and which laboratory accreditation (e.g. ILAC-recognised) is accepted before relying on existing Chinese test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古的 LED 照明 EMC 发射在 MASM 合格认证下通过所采 CISPR 15 标准处理。限值与中国 GB 17743 基本协调（均源自 CISPR 15），故重新测试负担可能减少。但 CCC EMC 报告不被自动接受——在依赖现有中国检测报告前，请与 MASM 确认 EMC 是否属于该灯具类别范围，以及所接受的实验室认可资质（如 ILAC 认可）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古的 LED 照明 EMC 發射在 MASM 合格認證下通過所採 CISPR 15 標準處理。限值與中國 GB 17743 基本協調（均源自 CISPR 15），故重新測試負擔可能減少。但 CCC EMC 報告不被自動接受——在依賴現有中國檢測報告前，請與 MASM 確認 EMC 是否屬於該燈具類別範圍，以及所接受的實驗室認可資質（如 ILAC 認可）。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval for Wireless / Smart Luminaires (CRC)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线 / 智能灯具的无线电型号核准（CRC）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線 / 智能燈具的無線電型號核准（CRC）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi or Bluetooth smart lighting, RF remote control) require radio type approval / authorization from the Communications Regulatory Commission (CRC) of Mongolia, the national radio spectrum regulator, in addition to MASM safety/EMC conformity. CRC governs the use of radio frequencies and the approval of radio-transmitting equipment in Mongolia. The wireless module's operating frequency bands, transmit power, and any frequency-plan constraints must align with Mongolian spectrum allocations. This is a separate authorization from product safety certification and from the EMC emissions assessment.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙智能照明、射频遥控）除 MASM 安全/EMC 合格认证外，还须取得蒙古通信监管委员会（CRC，国家无线电频谱监管机构）的无线电型号核准/授权。CRC 监管蒙古无线电频率的使用及无线电发射设备的核准。无线模块的工作频段、发射功率及任何频率规划限制须符合蒙古频谱划分。这是独立于产品安全认证及 EMC 发射评定的单独授权。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi 或藍牙智能照明、射頻遙控）除 MASM 安全/EMC 合格認證外，還須取得蒙古通信監管委員會（CRC，國家無線電頻譜監管機構）的無線電型號核准/授權。CRC 監管蒙古無線電頻率的使用及無線電發射設備的核准。無線模組的工作頻段、發射功率及任何頻率規劃限制須符合蒙古頻譜劃分。這是獨立於產品安全認證及 EMC 發射評定的單獨授權。

standards_or_laws: CRC (Communications Regulatory Commission of Mongolia) — radio equipment type approval / authorization for wireless-enabled products
Mongolian radio spectrum allocation and frequency-plan requirements

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, in addition to CCC where applicable. SRRC approval covers permitted frequency bands and transmit-power limits for the Chinese market. SRRC type approval is specific to China and is not recognised by Mongolia's CRC; the spectrum plans and authorization procedures differ between the two jurisdictions.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）除适用情况下的 CCC 外，还须就无线模块取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。SRRC 核准涵盖中国市场允许的频段及发射功率限值。SRRC 型号核准仅适用于中国，不被蒙古 CRC 所认可；两个司法管辖区的频谱规划及授权程序不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）除適用情況下的 CCC 外，還須就無線模組取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。SRRC 核准涵蓋中國市場允許的頻段及發射功率限值。SRRC 型號核准僅適用於中國，不被蒙古 CRC 所認可；兩個司法管轄區的頻譜規劃及授權程序不同。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled products in China (radio module frequency and power limits)

gap.en: A Chinese SRRC type approval does not satisfy Mongolian requirements — wireless luminaires require separate CRC authorization in Mongolia. Manufacturers of smart/connected LED products must: (1) confirm the radio module's frequency bands and transmit power are permitted under Mongolian spectrum allocations; (2) obtain CRC radio type approval/authorization (typically via the in-country importer) before placing the wireless product on the market; (3) keep this separate from, and in addition to, the MASM safety/EMC conformity certification. Non-wireless luminaires are not affected by this row. Verify the current CRC application procedure, accepted test reports, and any local-representative requirement.
gap.zh: 中国 SRRC 型号核准不满足蒙古要求——无线灯具在蒙古须另行取得 CRC 授权。智能/联网 LED 产品制造商须：（1）确认无线模块的频段及发射功率符合蒙古频谱划分；（2）在将无线产品投放市场前取得 CRC 无线电型号核准/授权（通常经在地进口商办理）；（3）将其与 MASM 安全/EMC 合格认证分开并作为额外要求。非无线灯具不受本行影响。请核实现行 CRC 申请程序、所接受的检测报告及任何当地代表要求。
gap.zht: 中國 SRRC 型號核准不滿足蒙古要求——無線燈具在蒙古須另行取得 CRC 授權。智能/聯網 LED 產品製造商須：（1）確認無線模組的頻段及發射功率符合蒙古頻譜劃分；（2）在將無線產品投放市場前取得 CRC 無線電型號核准/授權（通常經在地進口商辦理）；（3）將其與 MASM 安全/EMC 合格認證分開並作為額外要求。非無線燈具不受本行影響。請核實現行 CRC 申請程序、所接受的檢測報告及任何當地代表要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (wireless products only) — CRC radio type approval/authorization required for LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality before Mongolian market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (wireless products only) — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China; not recognised by Mongolia's CRC

source.publisher: CRC — Communications Regulatory Commission of Mongolia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless/smart LED luminaires require radio type approval from Mongolia's CRC, separate from and additional to MASM safety/EMC conformity. A Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised by CRC — confirm the radio module's bands and power are permitted under Mongolian spectrum allocations and obtain CRC authorization (typically via the in-country importer) before market placement. Non-wireless luminaires are not affected. Verify the current CRC procedure and accepted test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线/智能 LED 灯具须取得蒙古 CRC 的无线电型号核准，独立于 MASM 安全/EMC 合格认证并作为额外要求。中国 SRRC 核准不被 CRC 所认可——请确认无线模块的频段及功率符合蒙古频谱划分，并在投放市场前取得 CRC 授权（通常经在地进口商办理）。非无线灯具不受影响。请核实现行 CRC 程序及所接受的检测证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線/智能 LED 燈具須取得蒙古 CRC 的無線電型號核准，獨立於 MASM 安全/EMC 合格認證並作為額外要求。中國 SRRC 核准不被 CRC 所認可——請確認無線模組的頻段及功率符合蒙古頻譜劃分，並在投放市場前取得 CRC 授權（通常經在地進口商辦理）。非無線燈具不受影響。請核實現行 CRC 程序及所接受的檢測證據。
